steps.text: Semantic binding: Ad Delivery • Entity: Line Delivery

steps.expression: (() => { const close = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Close')); if (close) { close.click(); } window.__artifactDownloadCapture = { filename: '', payload: '', mimeType: '' }; const originalCreate = URL.createObjectURL.bind(URL); URL.createObjectURL = (blob) => { window.__artifactDownloadCapture.mimeType = blob.type || ''; blob.text().then((text) => { window.__artifactDownloadCapture.payload = text; }); return originalCreate(blob); }; const originalClick = HTMLAnchorElement.prototype.click; HTMLAnchorElement.prototype.click = function() { window.__artifactDownloadCapture.filename = this.download || ''; return originalClick.call(this); }; return true; })()

(() => { const button = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Save artifact')); return !!button && !button.disabled && button.getAttribute('aria-disabled') !== 'true'; })()

steps.text: Saved exploration artifact: Report Builder Demo
Saved report payload: Report Builder Demo
Get ReportDocument response: Forecasting Locations Top Markets Q3
Reopened ReportDocument Forecasting Locations Top Markets Q3 for editing.

steps.expression: (() => { const reopened = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__chart-inline-notice')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '')).includes('Reopened ReportDocument: Forecasting Locations Top Markets Q3')); if (!reopened) { return false; } const text = reopened.innerText || reopened.textContent || ''; return text.includes('Review export') || text.includes('Inspect export'); })()

(() => { const reopened = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__chart-inline-notice')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '')).includes('Reopened ReportDocument: Forecasting Locations Top Markets Q3')); if (!reopened) { throw new Error('Reopened section not found.'); } const button = Array.from(reopened.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => { const text = (entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim(); return text === 'Inspect export' || text === 'Review export'; }); if (!button) { throw new Error('Inspect export button not found in reopened section.'); } button.click(); return true; })()

(() => { const summary = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[aria-label="Reopened export request summary"]')).find(Boolean); if (!summary) { throw new Error('Reopened export request summary not found.'); } const container = summary.closest('.forge-report-builder__chart-inline-notice'); const button = Array.from(container.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Download export request')); if (!button) { throw new Error('Download export request button not found.'); } button.click(); return true; })()
window.__artifactDownloadCapture && window.__artifactDownloadCapture.filename === 'Forecasting Locations Top Markets Q3-savedPayload-pdf-export-request.json'
